JANKTHESPIRE-REACTIVE_ARMOUR_POWER.title: Reactive Armour
JANKTHESPIRE-REACTIVE_ARMOUR_POWER.descr: Whenever you lose HP on your turn, gain an equal amount of [gold]Plating[/gold].

JANKTHESPIRE-SUPERNOVA_POWER.title: Supernova
JANKTHESPIRE-SUPERNOVA_POWER.description: After 3 turns, deals damage to ALL enemies for each {singleStarIcon} consumed.
JANKTHESPIRE-SUPERNOVA_POWER.smartDescri: In {TurnsLeft} {TurnsLeft:plural:turn|turns}, will deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
